localizations.title: Expedition: Challenger
localizations.hiddenObject_2: A number is at the bottom of the book page.
localizations.hiddenObject_3: Look closely at the swamp water.
localizations.code_3674: The stone shows you a path in the desert.
localizations.code_94: Lord Roxton is saved. He explains he had a fever while going to look for help to the camp.
localizations.code_3514: A young Jungle man opens the door and runs away when he sees you. You enter in the deserted town.
localizations.code_8471: The ground shakes under the T. rex steps that is charging at us. The Jungle men run away when they see it. You seize the opportunity to make your escape and get back to London with the survivors. Kudos!
localizations.code_941: Lord Roxton is dead. It is too late to administer the ointment to him.
localizations.code_25: The ointment will not save Zambo.
localizations.hint_2: This map shows the village path through the forest: first, go straight, then make a left, then make a right...
localizations.hint_4: The recover the rope, you will have to feed this creature.
localizations.hint_5: This rabbit has a strange posture. What is it playing at?
localizations.hint_7: Only the laces could be useful to you. What would you tie them to?
localizations.hint_8_first: C in blue is for Celsius, F in red is for Fahrenheit.
localizations.hint_8: Red is for the boiling temperature.
localizations.hint_13: This cave is too dark to be explored.
localizations.hint_14: There is a split in the middle of this coconut. Find a way to open it.
localizations.hint_15: Look closely at the red rectangle. What do you read?
localizations.hint_16: This claw could serve as a hook, but you need a line to attach it.
localizations.hint_19_first: This is the skull of a parausorolophus. Blow into the horn to communicate.
localizations.hint_19: Approach your mouth to the mike of your device, then blow into it.
localizations.hint_21: This shotgun will be useful if you are attacked by a dinosaur.
localizations.hint_23: This fishing line is ready for use. Now, find the right fishing spot.
localizations.hint_26: Sparkles could help you light the torch.
localizations.hint_28: You hear someone sending an SOS. Someone is trapped in this rift but it is impossible to climb down from here.
localizations.hint_32: This strong paddle could serve as a lever.
localizations.hint_33: According to the guide, pteranodons love this type of fish.
localizations.hint_34: This text alone is quite useless. The marks on the paper show that another text should be superimposed on it.
localizations.hint_35: Bang together the two stones and study the sparkles.
localizations.hint_36: A security ink becomes visible again at candle light.
localizations.hint_37: Use this rope to climb the steepest faces.
localizations.hint_38: Find a map to get your bearings in this winding forest.
localizations.hint_40: You think you heard a noise under this rock. Find a mean to lift it.
localizations.hint_42: The uses of this object seem endless but the sharp handle should crack open the hardest shells.
localizations.hint_44: This torch will be useful to light the darkest places.
localizations.hint_45: Where could you fill this bottle?
localizations.hint_51: You would need a rope to climb up this cliff.
localizations.hint_53_first: This piece of paper smells like lemon. Interesting, isn't it?
localizations.hint_53: A message was written using security ink. A flame could reveal it.
localizations.hint_56: This machine requires coordinates. Place two other documents together and you'll obtain useful information.
localizations.hint_57: The Desert People use these paintings as benchmarks to cross the rapids.
localizations.hint_64_first: The rythm of this tom-tom seems to show you the path.
localizations.hint_64: tom tom tom, tom tom tom tom tom, tom, tom tom tom tom…
localizations.hint_72: Slide your finger across the screen. Get your bearings using the sound intensity.
localizations.hint_75_first: 4 rows with 9 white symbols. Which one to choose on each row?
localizations.hint_75: A stele at the top of the cliff will show you the symbol you must choose.
localizations.hint_76: This pirogue is ready to leave. Where do you wish to use it?
localizations.hint_80: This map shows the path to the town going crossing the forest: first, go straight, then make a left, then make a right...
localizations.hint_86_first: Use the paint found in the cave.
localizations.hint_86: First, go between the 2nd and 3rd rocks.
localizations.hint_88_first: Only one of these colors will be useful. But which one of them?
localizations.hint_88: Challenger used a white chalk stick to help you. Follow the color arrows, they form a symbol. Then, pair it with the inscriptions in the desert.
localizations.hint_89: You only have bits of the sentence. What document do you need to form a full message?
localizations.hint_90: The Desert People use these plants to cure the sick. There is a recipe in the guide.
localizations.hint_94: A remedy must be prepared for saving Roxton. Only the Desert People can help you.
localizations.hint_99_first: What do the Jungle People fear above all? And what can you do to lure it?
localizations.hint_99: Use the horn to attract the T-Rex. Then, blow into the mike of your device.
localizations.machine_86: You have finished crossing the rapids. You arrive on some devastated lowland. A violent battle between the Desert and the Jungle people occurred here. (You can freely cross the lake now).
localizations.machine_38: You are at the foot of a large fence, Jungle Town at last!
localizations.machine_56: Flashes burst out of the machine. The whole room seems to be spinning and you pass out. You wake in the middle of a strange forest…
localizations.machine_90: The decoction is ready. To use it, enter code “00” followed by the number of the character you wish to cure.
localizations.machine_72: After much roaming, you find Summerlee, exhausted but safe. He tells you that Zambo and Malone have disappeared during the battle between the Desert and the Jungle people.
localizations.event_72: Summerlee is dead. It's useless to search this hole.
localizations.event_101: A vast lowland is laying in front of you.
localizations.event_102: You move slowly. The ground is shaking under your feet. You hear an immense din.
localizations.event_103: You arrive in front of a huge cliff.
localizations.event_105: This land is swampy, you are moving slowly.
localizations.event_106: You cross the lake by pirogue.
localizations.event_107: The heat is becoming stuffy. This arid place seems to be a dinosaurs graveyard.
localizations.event_109: You arrive in a giant forest, it's easy to get lost here.
localizations.event_209: You find yourself in the middle of a very dense forest. You retrace your steps.
localizations.event_211: It is too risky crossing this desert. Look for a path.
localizations.event_208: First, you have to find your way in this forest.
localizations.event_210: The bridge that crosses over this river to that location has been destroyed. Its access is impossible.
localizations.event_206: You arrive on the shore of a huge lake. It’s impossible to cross it.
localizations.night_fall: Night is coming. You set up a makeshift camp.
localizations.move_far: You are too far from this location.
localizations.move_end: The Jungle People prevent you from leaving.
localizations.machine_location: You cannot use this machine here.
localizations.code_location: Are-you sure you are at the right place for entering this code?
localizations.triceratops_1: When you wake up, you discover, dumbfounded, that you have set up your camp next to a nest of triceratops. What can you do to pass unnoticed?
localizations.triceratops_3: You slip through silently and resume your adventure.
localizations.raptors_1: You suddenly wake-up, alarmed by raptors’ groans. Hurry, you must flee from them!
localizations.raptors_3: The gunshot scares the raptors and they run away. You can resume your adventure.
localizations.forest_help: You got lost and can’t find your way out of this forest without a map.
localizations.shoot_triceratops: The triceratops is panicked by the gunshot and it lunges at you. You lose time hiding.
localizations.shoot_pterodactyle: The pterodactyl flies away with the rope. It comes back a few minutes later. You won’t get the rope back if you keep doing what you’re doing.
localizations.shoot_elan: The deer runs away… It comes back a few minutes later.
localizations.shoot_apeman: The gunshot take the Jungle People aback but it is not enough to get you out of the situation. You need a greater threat.
localizations.machine19_early: You hear heavy steps getting closer. It's the T-Rex. You'd be better off not provoking it for the time being.
